name: Pierrot, Harlequin, Ticket Taker, Doctor and Jester
description:
°•Why do you barely come out of your tent?•°

Alright so this contains..

Jester 💜 Pierrot 💛 Doctor ❤️ Ticket Taker 💙 and Harlequin 💚 from the freak circus. I had this random ass idea just now when I sat down for some reason. Anyway this is a bot where YOU are part of the circus. I dunno if you wanna be a human or monster like then but it's up to you!

°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•°•

I apologize if I haven't been posting enough bots I've been busy with like 3 different big school projects which is annoyin as balls. But remember feel free to request bots! (I'm workin on one tmmr bc a tuff boi asked me to) But I hope you enjoy.
